messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud IAM → OCI IAM

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| IAM | IAM |
| Service Accounts | Instance Principal |
| Workload Identity | Dynamic Groups |
| Roles | Policies |

### OCI IAM

- Users, Groups
- Dynamic Groups (like workload identity)
- Policies (like IAM roles)

### Instance Principal

```hcl
resource "oci_identity_dynamic_group" "app_dg" {
  name = "app-dg"
  matching_rule = "ALL {instance.compartment.id = '${var.compartment_id}'}"
}

resource "oci_identity_policy" "app_policy" {
  name = "app-policy"
  statement = "Allow dynamic-group app-dg to manage resources in compartment app"
}
```

### Diferencas

- OCI: Compartment-based
- GCP: Project-based
- Policies: explicit allow only
